THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MASTER_OF_MANKIND-EMP: [sine]This Spire is a flaw in humanity's future. I will correct it.[/sine]
You speak of humanity as though it were yours to command.
[sine]I have seen the end of this path. Stand aside.[/sine]
Then come and learn how little foresight is worth.
Replace [gold]The Burning Blade[/gold] with [gold]The Emperor's Radiant Burning Blade[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ANCIENT_FORESIGHT_UPGR: Replace [gold]The Emperor's Foresight[/gold], upgraded or not, with [gold]Ten Thousand Futures[/gold].
